'''Insect mimic message droids''' were small droids which, if not observed too closely, seemed to be small winged insects. They used a dorsal [[Holoprojector/Legends|holoprojector]] to relay messages.

{{Droid-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Republic 71|''Republic'' 71]]
